title: Pig game
description: A 2-player game played in the browser. The goal ? To be the first to reach 100 by throwing the dice. Careful : if you roll a 1, your current collected amount disappears !

title: Guess my number
description: A 2-player game to be played in the browser, that consists of guessing a random number between 1 and 20.

title: Board Game
description: A board game built in C++, using classes to model the board, players, and turn-based gameplay.

title: Blackjack
description: A simplified version of the game Blackjack. One player versus an automated dealer, with only stand or hit actions. Use of classes to hold the player's money and cards.

title: Pong (Java / Processing)
description: A Pong clone built in Java with Processing for an LMU course, extended with 3 additional features beyond the base assignment.
